stem: The scatterplot shows the relationship between two variables, x and y. Which of the following equations is the most appropriate linear model for the data shown?
explanation: As x increases, y decreases, so the model must have a negative slope, and near x = 0 the value of y is above 9, so the y-intercept is about 9.4. Only y = 9.4 − 0.9x has a y-intercept near 9.4 and a small negative slope.
